texto: Reading is an important product of language that serves as a foundation of civilization. Without it, humans would essentially function on sound and instinct alone, much like beasts.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Irvin weathersby Jr.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Reading is an important product of language that serves as a foundation of civilization. Without …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, culture, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
